title: Aattakkari Maman Ponnu Lyrics Tharai Thappattai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Aattakkari Maman Ponnu Song Lyrics
Singer: M.M.Manasi, Prasanna
Lyrics: Ilaiyaraaja

Attakkari maman ponnu
ketkavenaam kasaikku thinnu
koottu serndhu pottu
thaakka vaa,
ah kitta vaa
konjam ottikka
kattikka va

unna veratti pudikkathaan
oru virupam porakkudhu.
morachi paakkura
vetti veruppa yaethura.

nethu partha
vayasu pochu
maathu maathu
pecha maathu
kaettu kaettu
pulichu pochu di,
oththu di,
vetti velaya vittirudi.

enna verati pudikkathaan
vandhu thorathi paakkura.
adi verupu yaethura
verum vedikka kaattura.
un thookkamey pochuna
adhil enaku porupilla.

en manasu unaku
sariya theriyumey.
adadaa vasaayum aachu
unakku puriyumey

nee irukkum idamthaan
enakku kovailaya.
manasa thorandhu pesu
solla vaayillayaa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for the song Aattakkari Maman Ponnu?

The music was composed by the legendary composer Ilaiyaraaja.

Which movie features the song Aattakkari Maman Ponnu?

The song is featured in the Tamil movie Thaarai Thappattai.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Thaarai Thappattai?

The lead roles are played by Sasikumar and Varalaxmi Sarathkumar.

What is the release year of the movie Thaarai Thappattai?

The movie was released in the year 2016.

What is the theme of the song Aattakkari Maman Ponnu?

The song is a lively folk number celebrating cultural traditions and festivities.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Aattakkari Maman Ponnu from the movie Thaarai Thappattai, released in 2016, features the lead actors Sasikumar and Varalaxmi Sarathkumar. Composed by Ilaiyaraaja and sung by Manasi MM and Prasanna, this energetic folk number captures the essence of Tamil cultural festivities. The lyrics, penned by Ilaiyaraaja, convey a vibrant celebration of life and traditions. This track is a perfect blend of traditional rhythms and modern musical elements, evoking joy and enthusiasm.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aattakkari Maman Ponnu, a vibrant and energetic track from the movie Thaarai Thappattai, showcases the brilliance of Ilaiyaraaja's composition paired with the dynamic vocals of Manasi MM and Prasanna. This song captures the essence of Tamil folk music, blending traditional rhythms with a contemporary flair. Dive into this masterpiece that celebrates culture and rhythm with unmatched enthusiasm.
stanzaMeanings: Aattakkari Maman Ponnu Song Lyrics Singer: M.M.Manasi, Prasanna Lyrics: Ilaiyaraaja
The playful girl, uncle's daughter, don't just listen, come join the fun, come closer, let's connect and bond.
A desire arises to catch you and hold you. The sight of your stubbornness brings irritation.
The youth I saw yesterday has passed, the words keep changing, and listening to them has become tiresome. Enough, you've left the work unfinished.
You come to provoke me, but your actions only irritate me. It's just a show you're putting on. If your sleep is disturbed, it's not my responsibility.
You know my heart well. Oh, you've understood my feelings.
Your smile spreads like smoke. Keep it, as it adds charm to the festive dance.
A peculiar girl, what are you thinking about, dear friend?
On the rugged mountain, will a flower bloom on a thorny plant?
The place where you are feels like a temple to me. Open your heart and speak; don't you have words?
The untold story lies within. Where is the nonexistent?
I can't handle it; there's no way to leave you. I can't walk alone; there's no path for me.
